title: Multi-branch workflow always using "otherwise" path

posts.author: silverspeaks (Silver)
posts.cookedHtml:
I built a workflow with multi-branch conditions and every time I trigger it, the workflow follows the “otherwise” path.

I thought it might be because I was using the same conditions in multiple swim lanes–two or more branches contained the same label options, amongst others–but simplifying it to one label each did not fix the problem either.

Can anyone tell what I’m doing wrong from looking at this?

Screenshot 2025-06-21 at 12.05.12 PM2022×1240 234 KB

Screenshot 2025-06-21 at 12.07.42 PM810×1322 69.1 KB
